content: should `GET /eth/v2/debug/beacon/states/{state_id}` always return the post-block state for all state ids?

author: sproul
content: IMO justified and finalized should be the pending state, by slot should be whatever is canonical, and by root should be whatever the root points to

author: potuz
content:
I left a justification here for why I think post CL should be always preferred https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/issues/572#issuecomment-3991849618

And I think that is mostly right, avoiding the caller to have to add logic to find out. This is exactly what I'm facing now in checkpoint sync but not knowing what the server replies, and I can see the same happening if you request by slot. Anyway I don't think there's many consumers of this endpoint so not that important. But it is for checkpoint sync

author: barnabasbusa
content:
I can't replicate your issue potuz. 

I've been testing with 

```yaml
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: geth
      el_image: ethpandaops/geth:epbs-devnet-0
  cl:
    - cl_type: lighthouse
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lighthouse:epbs-devnet-0
      cl_extra_params:
        - --epochs-per-migration 99999
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:epbs-devnet-0
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: ethpandaops/prysm-beacon-chain:epbs-devnet-0-sync
network_params:
  network: epbs-devnet-0
checkpoint_sync_enabled: true
checkpoint_sync_url: https://beacon.epbs-devnet-0.ethpandaops.io/lodestar
```

And its been working
